function_declarations.name: wpab__core__get-site-info
function_declarations.description: Returns site information configured in WordPress. By default returns all fields, or optionally a filtered subset.

fields.description: Optional: Limit response to specific fields. If omitted, all fields are returned.

function_declarations.name: wpab__core__get-user-info
function_declarations.description: Returns basic profile details for the current authenticated user to support personalization, auditing, and access-aware behavior.

function_declarations.name: wpab__core__get-environment-info
function_declarations.description: Returns core details about the site's runtime context for diagnostics and compatibility (environment, PHP runtime, database server info, WordPress version).

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__db-query
function_declarations.description: Execute raw SQL queries. Support SELECT, UPDATE, DELETE. Limit results.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__modify-file
function_declarations.description: Writes or overwrites a file on the server with the provided content. You MUST always provide the full 'content' parameter. To read a file, use the read-file tool instead. Safely restricted to wp-content.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__execute-php
function_declarations.description: Execute arbitrary PHP code within the WordPress environment. Use this to create posts, manage taxonomies, update settings, or call any native WordPress function. Do NOT include opening <?php tags. Return a value to receive it in the response.

code.description: PHP code to execute. Can include a return statement.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__read-file
function_declarations.description: Read a file from the server.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__list-directory
function_declarations.description: List files and folders in a directory.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__manage-plugins
function_declarations.description: Manage WordPress plugins safely (list, install, activate, deactivate, delete).

slug.description: Plugin directory slug (e.g., "woocommerce") or full path (e.g., "woocommerce/woocommerce.php"). Not needed for list action.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__manage-themes
function_declarations.description: Manage WordPress themes safely (list, activate).

slug.description: Theme slug. Not needed for list action.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__manage-system
function_declarations.description: Perform system actions like flushing permalinks, clearing cache, and transients.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__manage-debug
function_declarations.description: Enable or disable WordPress debug logging. When enabled, it sets WP_DEBUG and WP_DEBUG_LOG to true and WP_DEBUG_DISPLAY to false in wp-config.php. Read the debug log file from wp-content/debug.log

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__generate-image
function_declarations.description: Generates an image based on a prompt and saves it to the WordPress media library. If post_id is provided, sets it as the thumbnail. Otherwise, returns the media ID so you can use it later.

post_id.description: Optional. The ID of the post to set the thumbnail for.

prompt.description: The prompt to generate the image.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__manage-posts
function_declarations.description: Create, read, update, or delete posts and pages.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__manage-comments
function_declarations.description: Get, approve, spam, or trash comments.

args.description: Arguments. E.g. {"status": "hold"} for get, or {"comment_id": 12, "status": "approve"} for set_status.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__manage-users
function_declarations.description: Manage WordPress users, roles, and capabilities.

args.description: Arguments for the action. For create_user/update_user use user data array. For add_role use {"role":"editor", "display_name":"Editor"}. For add_cap/remove_cap use {"role":"editor", "cap":"edit_theme_options"}.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__manage-media
function_declarations.description: Manage WordPress media library (update metadata, alt text, sideload images).

args.description: Arguments. E.g. for update_meta {"id": 12, "alt_text": "A cool image", "title": "Cool Image"}. For upload_from_url {"url": "https://..."}.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__manage-menus
function_declarations.description: Manage WordPress menus, locations, and nav items.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__manage-woocommerce
function_declarations.description: Manage WooCommerce products and orders safely using native WC functions.

function_declarations.name: wpab__wizard-blocks__manage-wpml
function_declarations.description: Translate posts, media, terms, and strings using WPML.

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__list-post-types
function_declarations.description: Retrieves a list of SCF post types. Returns all if no filter provided.

filter.description: Optional filters to apply to results.

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__get-post-type
function_declarations.description: Retrieves SCF post type configuration by ID or key.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__create-post-type
function_declarations.description: Creates a new instance of SCF post type with provided configuration. Omitted optional fields use schema defaults.

key.description: Unique identifier for the post type with post_type_ prefix (e.g. 'post_type_book')

post_type.description: The post type key passed to register_post_type() (e.g. 'book', 'product'). Max 20 characters, lowercase letters/numbers/underscores/dashes only, cannot be WordPress reserved terms.

menu_order.description: The order of this entity in the admin menu

advanced_configuration.description: [SCF] Whether advanced configuration options are enabled. Accepts boolean or integer (0/1).

modified.description: [SCF Export Only] Unix timestamp of last modification

import_source.description: [SCF Export Only] Source of import if this entity was imported

import_date.description: [SCF Export Only] Date when this entity was imported

labels.description: Labels for the post type in various contexts. If omitted, WordPress auto-generates labels from 'title'.

name.description: General name for the post type, usually plural

singular_name.description: Name for one object of this post type

all_items.description: The 'All Items' text used in the admin menu

description.description: A short description of what your post type is

public.description: Whether a post type is intended for use publicly either via the admin interface or by front-end users

hierarchical.description: Whether the post type is hierarchical (e.g. page)

exclude_from_search.description: Whether to exclude posts with this post type from front-end search results

publicly_queryable.description: Whether queries can be performed on the front-end for the post type as part of parse_request()

show_ui.description: Whether to generate and allow a UI for managing this post type in the admin

show_in_menu.description: Where to show the post type in the admin menu

menu_position.description: The position in the menu order. SCF exports as empty string or null when not set, integer when set. Import accepts all types and casts to integer. If omitted, appears below Comments in admin menu.

menu_icon.description: The menu icon. Can be a string (URL or dashicon name) or SCF object format with type and value properties. If omitted, uses default posts icon (dashicons-admin-post).

admin_menu_parent.description: The parent menu slug for this post type menu

show_in_admin_bar.description: Whether to make this post type available in the WordPress admin bar

show_in_nav_menus.description: Whether post_type is available for selection in navigation menus

supports.description: Core feature(s) the post type supports. Common values: 'title', 'editor', 'author', 'thumbnail', 'excerpt', 'trackbacks', 'custom-fields', 'comments', 'revisions', 'page-attributes', 'post-formats'. Custom supports are also allowed. If omitted, defaults to ['title', 'editor'].

taxonomies.description: An array of taxonomy identifiers that will be registered for the post type. SCF exports as empty string when none selected, but accepts both array and string on import.

can_export.description: Whether to allow this post type to be exported

delete_with_user.description: Whether to delete posts of this type when deleting a user

has_archive.description: Whether there should be post type archives, or if a string, the archive slug to use

has_archive_slug.description: The slug to use for the archive if has_archive is enabled

rewrite.description: Triggers the handling of rewrites for this post type

query_var.description: Sets the query_var key for this post type

capability_type.description: The string to use to build the read, edit, and delete capabilities

rename_capabilities.description: Whether to rename capabilities for this post type

singular_capability_name.description: The singular capability name (e.g. 'post' creates 'edit_post', 'delete_post' capabilities)

plural_capability_name.description: The plural capability name (e.g. 'posts' creates 'edit_posts', 'delete_posts' capabilities)

capabilities.description: [SCF Not Yet Supported] Custom capabilities for this post type. This property is preserved in exports but not currently implemented during import. Currently, use the rename_capabilities system instead for custom capability names.

map_meta_cap.description: Whether to use the internal default meta capability handling

show_in_rest.description: Whether to include the post type in the REST API

allow_ai_access.description: Whether to expose this post type to AI integrations

ai_description.description: Description that helps AI integrations understand how to use this post type

rest_base.description: To change the base URL of REST API route

rest_namespace.description: To change the namespace URL of REST API route

rest_controller_class.description: REST API Controller to use for this post type

register_meta_box_cb.description: Callback function for custom meta box registration

enter_title_here.description: Custom placeholder text for the title field

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__update-post-type
function_declarations.description: Updates an existing instance of SCF post type. Properties not provided are preserved (merge behavior).

register_meta_box_cb.description: Callback function for custom meta box registration

enter_title_here.description: Custom placeholder text for the title field

ID.description: WordPress post ID. Present in GET/LIST/CREATE/UPDATE/IMPORT/DUPLICATE outputs.

_valid.description: Validation cache flag. Indicates whether the entity passed validation. Can be boolean or integer (0/1).

local.description: Source indicator. Present only if entity is locally-defined (e.g., from local JSON files). Stripped during export.

not_registered.description: Flag indicating that this entity could not be registered because another one with the same key already exists. Present only when registration was skipped.

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__delete-post-type
function_declarations.description: Permanently deletes an instance of SCF post type. This action cannot be undone.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__duplicate-post-type
function_declarations.description: Creates a copy of SCF post type with a new ID and unique key. Title gets (copy) appended. Active status is inherited from source.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

new_post_id.description: Optional ID of an existing post to overwrite. Used for import/sync operations.

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__export-post-type
function_declarations.description: Exports an instance of SCF post type as JSON for backup or transfer. Internal fields (ID, local, _valid) are stripped.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__import-post-type
function_declarations.description: Imports an instance of SCF post type from JSON data. If ID is provided, updates existing; otherwise creates new with schema defaults for omitted fields.

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__trash-post-type
function_declarations.description: Moves SCF post type to trash. Can be restored using untrash.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__untrash-post-type
function_declarations.description: Restores SCF post type from trash to previous status.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__list-taxonomies
function_declarations.description: Retrieves a list of SCF taxonomies. Returns all if no filter provided.

filter.description: Optional filters to apply to results.

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__get-taxonomy
function_declarations.description: Retrieves SCF taxonomy configuration by ID or key.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__create-taxonomy
function_declarations.description: Creates a new instance of SCF taxonomy with provided configuration. Omitted optional fields use schema defaults.

key.description: Unique identifier for the taxonomy with taxonomy_ prefix (e.g. 'taxonomy_genre')

taxonomy.description: The taxonomy key passed to register_taxonomy() (e.g. 'genre', 'product_tag'). Max 32 characters, lowercase letters/numbers/underscores/dashes only, cannot be WordPress reserved terms.

menu_order.description: The order of this entity in the admin menu

advanced_configuration.description: [SCF] Whether advanced configuration options are enabled. Accepts boolean or integer (0/1).

modified.description: [SCF Export Only] Unix timestamp of last modification

import_source.description: [SCF Export Only] Source of import if this entity was imported

import_date.description: [SCF Export Only] Date when this entity was imported

object_type.description: Post types to which this taxonomy should be attached (e.g. ['post', 'page', 'book']). If empty, taxonomy exists but isn't usable from any post type.

labels.description: Labels for the taxonomy in various contexts. If omitted, WordPress auto-generates labels from 'title'.

name.description: General name for the taxonomy, usually plural

singular_name.description: Name for one object of this taxonomy

popular_items.description: The 'Popular Items' text (used for non-hierarchical taxonomies)

parent_item.description: The 'Parent Item' text (used for hierarchical taxonomies)

name_field_description.description: Description for the Name field on the term edit screen

slug_field_description.description: Description for the Slug field on the term edit screen

parent_field_description.description: Description for the Parent field on the term edit screen

desc_field_description.description: Description for the Description field on the term edit screen

separate_items_with_commas.description: The 'Separate items with commas' text (used for non-hierarchical taxonomies)

add_or_remove_items.description: The 'Add or remove items' text (used for non-hierarchical taxonomies)

choose_from_most_used.description: The 'Choose from most used' text (used for non-hierarchical taxonomies)

filter_by_item.description: The 'Filter by item' text (used for hierarchical taxonomies)

description.description: A short description of what your taxonomy is

public.description: Whether a taxonomy is intended for use publicly either via the admin interface or by front-end users

publicly_queryable.description: Whether the taxonomy is publicly queryable

hierarchical.description: Whether the taxonomy is hierarchical (like categories) or flat (like tags)

show_ui.description: Whether to generate and allow a UI for managing this taxonomy in the admin

show_in_menu.description: Whether to show the taxonomy in the admin menu

show_in_nav_menus.description: Whether the taxonomy is available for selection in navigation menus

show_tagcloud.description: Whether to allow the Tag Cloud widget to use this taxonomy

show_in_quick_edit.description: Whether to show the taxonomy in the quick/bulk edit panel

show_admin_column.description: Whether to show a column for this taxonomy on the associated post type listing screens

assign_terms.description: Capability for assigning terms to posts

rewrite.description: Triggers the handling of rewrites for this taxonomy

query_var.description: Sets the query_var key for this taxonomy

default_term.description: Default term configuration for this taxonomy

default_term_enabled.description: Whether a default term is enabled

sort.description: Whether terms in this taxonomy should be sorted in the order they are provided to wp_set_object_terms()

meta_box_cb.description: Callback function name for custom meta box

meta_box_sanitize_cb.description: Callback function name for sanitizing taxonomy data saved from the meta box

show_in_rest.description: Whether to include the taxonomy in the REST API

allow_ai_access.description: Whether to expose this taxonomy to AI integrations

ai_description.description: Description that helps AI integrations understand how to use this taxonomy

rest_base.description: To change the base URL of REST API route

rest_namespace.description: To change the namespace URL of REST API route

rest_controller_class.description: REST API Controller to use for this taxonomy

rest_namespace.description: To change the namespace URL of REST API route

rest_controller_class.description: REST API Controller to use for this taxonomy

ID.description: WordPress post ID. Present in GET/LIST/CREATE/UPDATE/IMPORT/DUPLICATE outputs.

_valid.description: Validation cache flag. Indicates whether the entity passed validation. Can be boolean or integer (0/1).

local.description: Source indicator. Present only if entity is locally-defined (e.g., from local JSON files). Stripped during export.

not_registered.description: Flag indicating that this entity could not be registered because another one with the same key already exists. Present only when registration was skipped.

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__delete-taxonomy
function_declarations.description: Permanently deletes an instance of SCF taxonomy. This action cannot be undone.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__duplicate-taxonomy
function_declarations.description: Creates a copy of SCF taxonomy with a new ID and unique key. Title gets (copy) appended. Active status is inherited from source.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

new_post_id.description: Optional ID of an existing post to overwrite. Used for import/sync operations.

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__export-taxonomy
function_declarations.description: Exports an instance of SCF taxonomy as JSON for backup or transfer. Internal fields (ID, local, _valid) are stripped.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__import-taxonomy
function_declarations.description: Imports an instance of SCF taxonomy from JSON data. If ID is provided, updates existing; otherwise creates new with schema defaults for omitted fields.

key.description: Unique identifier for the taxonomy with taxonomy_ prefix (e.g. 'taxonomy_genre')

taxonomy.description: The taxonomy key passed to register_taxonomy() (e.g. 'genre', 'product_tag'). Max 32 characters, lowercase letters/numbers/underscores/dashes only, cannot be WordPress reserved terms.

menu_order.description: The order of this entity in the admin menu

advanced_configuration.description: [SCF] Whether advanced configuration options are enabled. Accepts boolean or integer (0/1).

modified.description: [SCF Export Only] Unix timestamp of last modification

import_source.description: [SCF Export Only] Source of import if this entity was imported

import_date.description: [SCF Export Only] Date when this entity was imported

object_type.description: Post types to which this taxonomy should be attached (e.g. ['post', 'page', 'book']). If empty, taxonomy exists but isn't usable from any post type.

labels.description: Labels for the taxonomy in various contexts. If omitted, WordPress auto-generates labels from 'title'.

name.description: General name for the taxonomy, usually plural

singular_name.description: Name for one object of this taxonomy

popular_items.description: The 'Popular Items' text (used for non-hierarchical taxonomies)

parent_item.description: The 'Parent Item' text (used for hierarchical taxonomies)

name_field_description.description: Description for the Name field on the term edit screen

slug_field_description.description: Description for the Slug field on the term edit screen

parent_field_description.description: Description for the Parent field on the term edit screen

desc_field_description.description: Description for the Description field on the term edit screen

separate_items_with_commas.description: The 'Separate items with commas' text (used for non-hierarchical taxonomies)

add_or_remove_items.description: The 'Add or remove items' text (used for non-hierarchical taxonomies)

choose_from_most_used.description: The 'Choose from most used' text (used for non-hierarchical taxonomies)

filter_by_item.description: The 'Filter by item' text (used for hierarchical taxonomies)

description.description: A short description of what your taxonomy is

public.description: Whether a taxonomy is intended for use publicly either via the admin interface or by front-end users

publicly_queryable.description: Whether the taxonomy is publicly queryable

hierarchical.description: Whether the taxonomy is hierarchical (like categories) or flat (like tags)

show_ui.description: Whether to generate and allow a UI for managing this taxonomy in the admin

show_in_menu.description: Whether to show the taxonomy in the admin menu

show_in_nav_menus.description: Whether the taxonomy is available for selection in navigation menus

show_tagcloud.description: Whether to allow the Tag Cloud widget to use this taxonomy

show_in_quick_edit.description: Whether to show the taxonomy in the quick/bulk edit panel

show_admin_column.description: Whether to show a column for this taxonomy on the associated post type listing screens

assign_terms.description: Capability for assigning terms to posts

rewrite.description: Triggers the handling of rewrites for this taxonomy

query_var.description: Sets the query_var key for this taxonomy

default_term.description: Default term configuration for this taxonomy

default_term_enabled.description: Whether a default term is enabled

sort.description: Whether terms in this taxonomy should be sorted in the order they are provided to wp_set_object_terms()

meta_box_cb.description: Callback function name for custom meta box

meta_box_sanitize_cb.description: Callback function name for sanitizing taxonomy data saved from the meta box

show_in_rest.description: Whether to include the taxonomy in the REST API

allow_ai_access.description: Whether to expose this taxonomy to AI integrations

ai_description.description: Description that helps AI integrations understand how to use this taxonomy

rest_base.description: To change the base URL of REST API route

rest_namespace.description: To change the namespace URL of REST API route

rest_controller_class.description: REST API Controller to use for this taxonomy

_valid.description: Validation cache flag. Indicates whether the entity passed validation. Can be boolean or integer (0/1).

local.description: Source indicator. Present only if entity is locally-defined (e.g., from local JSON files). Stripped during export.

not_registered.description: Flag indicating that this entity could not be registered because another one with the same key already exists. Present only when registration was skipped.

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__list-ui-options-pages
function_declarations.description: Retrieves a list of SCF ui options pages. Returns all if no filter provided.

filter.description: Optional filters to apply to results.

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__get-ui-options-page
function_declarations.description: Retrieves SCF ui options page configuration by ID or key.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__create-ui-options-page
function_declarations.description: Creates a new instance of SCF ui options page with provided configuration. Omitted optional fields use schema defaults.

key.description: Unique identifier for the options page with ui_options_page_ prefix (e.g. 'ui_options_page_site_settings')

menu_slug.description: The menu slug used in the admin URL (e.g. 'site-settings'). Lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, and dashes only.

menu_order.description: The order of this entity in the admin menu

advanced_configuration.description: [SCF] Whether advanced configuration options are enabled. Accepts boolean or integer (0/1).

modified.description: [SCF Export Only] Unix timestamp of last modification

import_source.description: [SCF Export Only] Source of import if this entity was imported

import_date.description: [SCF Export Only] Date when this entity was imported

page_title.description: The page title displayed in the browser tab and page heading. If omitted, falls back to 'title'.

parent_slug.description: The parent menu slug. Use 'none' for top-level menu, or a WordPress admin menu slug (e.g. 'options-general.php') for submenu. If omitted, defaults to top-level menu.

menu_title.description: The title displayed in the admin menu. If omitted, falls back to 'title'.

icon_url.description: [Legacy] Icon URL or dashicon class. Prefer menu_icon object format for new configurations.

menu_icon.description: The menu icon displayed in the admin menu. Accepts object format with type/value properties, or empty array when no icon is configured. If omitted, uses default gear icon (dashicons-admin-generic).

position.description: The position in the menu where this page should appear. SCF exports as empty string or null when not set, integer when set. If omitted, appears at bottom of admin menu.

redirect.description: When child pages exist for this parent page, whether to redirect to the first child page

description.description: A descriptive summary of the options page

update_button.description: The label used for the submit button which updates the fields on the options page

updated_message.description: The message displayed after successfully updating the options page

capability.description: The capability required for this menu to be displayed to the user

data_storage.description: Where to store field data. 'options' uses the options table, 'post_id' uses custom storage.

post_id.description: Custom storage location when data_storage is 'post_id'. Can be a numeric post ID (123) or a string ('user_2').

autoload.description: Whether to autoload the options when WordPress loads. Improves performance for frequently accessed options.

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__update-ui-options-page
function_declarations.description: Updates an existing instance of SCF ui options page. Properties not provided are preserved (merge behavior).

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__create-field-group
function_declarations.description: Creates a new instance of SCF field group with provided configuration. Omitted optional fields use schema defaults.

key.description: Unique identifier for the field group with group_ prefix (e.g. 'group_abc123')

fields.description: Array of field definitions. If empty array, field group appears but contains no fields.

menu_order.description: The order of this entity in the admin menu

modified.description: [SCF Export Only] Unix timestamp of last modification

items.description: Group of location rules (AND logic within group)

location.description: Location rules determining where this field group appears. Array of rule groups (OR logic between groups, AND logic within groups). If omitted or empty, field group won't appear on any edit screens.

position.description: Position of the field group on the edit screen

style.description: Visual style of the field group metabox

label_placement.description: Placement of field labels relative to fields

hide_on_screen.description: Screen elements to hide when this field group is displayed

show_in_rest.description: Whether to expose this field group's fields in the REST API

allow_ai_access.description: Whether to expose this field group to AI integrations

ai_description.description: Description that helps AI integrations understand how to use this field group

display_title.description: Alternative display title for the field group

function_declarations.description: Updates an existing instance of SCF field group. Properties not provided are preserved (merge behavior).

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__list-fields
function_declarations.description: Retrieves a list of SCF fields. Returns all if no filter provided. Can filter by parent (field group), type, or name.

filter.description: Filter fields by parent, type, or name.

parent.description: Field group ID or key to filter by.

type.description: Field type to filter by (e.g., text, image).

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__get-field
function_declarations.description: Retrieves a single SCF field by key or ID.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__create-field
function_declarations.description: Creates a new SCF field with provided configuration. Requires parent (field group ID).

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__update-field
function_declarations.description: Updates an existing SCF field. Properties not provided are preserved (merge behavior).

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__delete-field
function_declarations.description: Permanently deletes an SCF field.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__duplicate-field
function_declarations.description: Creates a copy of an SCF field with a new unique key. Optionally specify a new parent field group.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

new_parent_id.description: Optional field group ID to place the duplicate in.

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__export-field
function_declarations.description: Exports an SCF field as JSON for backup or transfer. Internal fields (ID, local, _valid) are stripped.

identifier.description: Schema for SCF entity identifiers (post types, field groups, fields, taxonomies, etc.)

function_declarations.name: wpab__scf__import-field
function_declarations.description: Imports an SCF field from JSON data. If key exists, updates existing; otherwise creates new.

function_declarations.name: wpab__ai__image-generation
function_declarations.description: Generate and edit images using AI. Requires an AI connector that includes support for image generation models.

prompt.description: Prompt used to generate an image.

reference.description: Optional base64-encoded image to use as a reference image for edits.

function_declarations.name: wpab__ai__image-import
function_declarations.description: Imports a base64 encoded image into the media library

data.description: The base64 encoded image data to import into the media library.

alt_text.description: The alt text of the image.

mime_type.description: The MIME type of the image.

ai_generated.description: Whether the image was generated by AI.

function_declarations.name: wpab__ai__image-prompt-generation
function_declarations.description: Generates a prompt from post content that can be used to generate an image

content.description: The content to use as inspiration for the generated image.

context.description: Any additional context to help generate the prompt. This can either be a string of additional context or can be a post ID that will then be used to get context from that post (if it exists).

style.description: Any additional style instructions to apply to the generated image.

function_declarations.name: wpab__ai__content-resizing
function_declarations.description: Shorten, expand, or rephrase selected block content. Requires an AI connector that includes support for text generation models.

post_id.description: The ID of the post to resize content for.

function_declarations.name: wpab__ai__excerpt-generation
function_declarations.description: Generates excerpt suggestions from content. Requires an AI connector that includes support for text generation models.

content.description: Content to generate an excerpt suggestion for.

context.description: Additional context to use when generating an excerpt suggestion for the content. This can either be a string of additional context or can be a post ID that will then be used to get context from that post (if it exists). If no content is provided but a valid post ID is used here, the content from that post will be used.

function_declarations.name: wpab__ai__alt-text-generation
function_declarations.description: Generates accessible alternative (alt) text for images using AI vision models, following common web accessibility guidance. Requires an AI connector that includes support for vision-based image analysis models.

attachment_id.description: The attachment ID of the image to generate alt text for.

image_url.description: URL or data URI of the image to generate alt text for. Used if attachment_id is not provided.

context.description: Optional context about the image or surrounding content to improve alt text relevance.

image_meta.description: Structured metadata about how the image block is used, such as whether it is linked.

function_declarations.name: wpab__ai__meta-description
function_declarations.description: Generates meta description suggestions and integrates those with various SEO plugins. Requires an AI connector that includes support for text generation models.

content.description: Post content to generate a meta description for.

title.description: The post title, used to avoid duplication in the generated description.

post_id.description: The post ID to generate a meta description for. If provided without content, the post content will be used.

function_declarations.name: wpab__ai__title-generation
function_declarations.description: Generates title suggestions from content. Requires an AI connector that includes support for text generation models.

content.description: Content to generate title suggestions for.

context.description: Additional context to use when generating title suggestions. This can either be a string of additional context or can be a post ID that will then be used to get context from that post (if it exists). If no content is provided but a valid post ID is used here, the content from that post will be used.

function_declarations.name: wpab__ai__get-post-details
function_declarations.description: Get the details of a post based on the post ID. Optionally, limit the details to specific fields.

post_id.description: The ID of the post to get the details of.

fields.description: The fields to get the details of. Will default to all fields if not provided.

function_declarations.name: wpab__ai__get-post-terms
function_declarations.description: Get the terms of a post based on the post ID and optionally filter by taxonomy.

post_id.description: The ID of the post to get the terms of.

taxonomy.description: The taxonomy to filter the terms by.
